name: The Back Nine Golf | Surprise, AZ
about: The Back Nine Golf in Surprise, AZ offers a golf simulation experience for enthusiasts. The venue is part of the Back Nine Golf chain, providing a dedicated space for indoor golf. Pricing and specific details about technology are not available from the website. The facility appears to cater to golfers looking for a controlled environment to practice or play virtual rounds.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to advanced golf simulation technology
Available for private events and group bookings
Potential for coaching and practice sessions

food_and_drink.notes: Food options available at the venue

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the venue, but you can bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and bar service, but outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole rounds take approximately 1-2 hours depending on simulator capacity and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Back Nine Golf welcomes families, though specific kid-friendly amenities are not detailed online.
